# Campfire

> AI Registry entry [AIR-23](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-23/campfire) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-01. Departments: finance.

**Category:** ERP / AI-Powered Financial Operations
**Cost:** TBC
**Departments:** Finance

## Overview

AI-native ERP for modernising financial operations. Built ground-up with AI core — automates routine accounting, reporting, financial planning. Reduces manual data entry and reconciliation.

## Capabilities

* AI-driven bookkeeping and transaction categorisation
* Automated financial reporting and real-time dashboards
* AP/AR workflow automation
* Intelligent reconciliation and anomaly detection
* Multi-entity, multi-currency

## Why Evaluating

With Ann Greed as new Financial Controller, opportunity to assess AI-native ERP vs legacy financial tooling. Direct comparator: Rillet (AIR-24) and Artifact AI (AIR-25). Awaiting Ann's assessment.

*Evaluating.*
